---
title: "博客"
description: "中文笔记与随笔"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: article
---

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const categoryTitle = document.querySelector(".quarto-listing-category-title");
  if (categoryTitle && categoryTitle.textContent.trim() === "Categories") {
    categoryTitle.textContent = "分类";
  }

  document.querySelectorAll(".quarto-listing-category .category").forEach(function(item) {
    const count = item.querySelector(".quarto-category-count");
    const text = item.childNodes[0] && item.childNodes[0].textContent.trim();
    if (text === "All") {
      item.childNodes[0].textContent = "全部 ";
      if (count) item.appendChild(count);
    }
  });

  document.querySelectorAll(".listing-date").forEach(function(item) {
    const text = item.textContent.trim();
    if (text === "May 3, 2026") {
      item.textContent = "2026 年 5 月 3 日";
    }
  });
});
</script>
```

::: {.blog-intro}
::: {.blog-kicker}
笔记与随笔
:::

这里会放一些关于统计、机器学习、量化金融、研究工具和日常思考的中文笔记。
:::
